column1: Jeremy Pena leads the slate with a strong track record, hitting safely in 80% of games and showing excellent recent form at the top of Houston’s lineup. Yordan Alvarez offers solid support with a favorable platoon advantage, though his recent hit rate lags behind Pena’s consistency. Ernie Clement also stands out with a steady approach and soft matchup, but Pena’s reliability at home makes him the top pick for Beat The Streak players tonight.
